debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
h : e.eval ≠ Clap.bits2num p inst✝ w args
⊢ (if Exp.eval (Clap.bits2num_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args) - e.eval = 0 then Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ cs else denotation.n) =
    denotation.n

failed_attempts:
specialize this (.c 0)
    simp [Exp.eval] at this
    exact this
  rw [Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero, h_val]
  split_ifs with h_if
  · contradiction
  · rfl

have h_val : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num
    let f_e (acc : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)) (b : ZMod p) := Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc
    let f_v (acc : ZMod p) (b : ZMod p) := b + 2 * acc
    have h_fold : ∀ (acc_e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)) (acc_v : ZMod p),
        acc_e.eval = acc_v → (Vector.foldl f_e acc_e args).eval = Vector.foldl f_v acc_v args := by
      induction w generalizing args with
      | zero =>
        intros acc_e acc_v h_acc
        have : args = #v[] := by simp
        simp [this, Vector.foldl, h_acc]
      | succ w ih =>
        intros acc_e acc_v h_acc
        have h_decomp : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
          ext i h
          match i with
          | .zero => simp; rfl
          | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
        rw [h_decomp]
        have h_red : ∀ {α β} (f : β → α → β) (acc : β) (h : α) (t : Vector α w),
            Vector.foldl f acc (Vector.insertIdx t 0 h) = Vector.foldl f (f acc h) t := by
          intros; simp [Vector.foldl, Vector.insertIdx, Array.insertIdx, Array.foldl_append']; rfl
        rw [h_red, h_red]
        apply ih
        simp [f_e, f_v, Exp.eval, h_acc]
    apply h_fold
    simp [Exp.eval]
  rw [h_val]
  simp only [sub_eq_zero]
  rw [if_neg]
  · rfl
  · exact h.symm

rw [if_neg]
  · rfl
  · intro heq
    apply h
    rw [← heq]
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
    generalize h_acc : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = acc
    have h_acc_v : acc.eval = 0 := by rw [← h_acc, Exp.eval]
    rw [h_acc_v]
    clear h_acc h_acc_v heq h cs e
    revert acc args
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      intros args acc _
      have : args = Vector.nil := by simp
      simp [this]
    | succ w ih =>
      intros args acc h_acc
      have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i h
        match i with
        | .zero => simp; rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
      rw [this]
      simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract,
        Array.size_append, List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add,
        Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
        Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
      have h_len : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
      rw [← h_len] at ih
      apply ih
      simp [Exp.eval, h_acc, mul_comm]

have : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    have h_red := @reduce₂ w args (Exp.c (bits2num args)) .nil (by simp [Exp.eval])
    unfold Cs.eval Exp.eval at h_red
    simp only [sub_eq_zero] at h_red
    by_cases hc : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args
    · exact hc
    · rw [if_neg hc] at h_red
      contradiction
  rw [this]
  simp only [sub_eq_zero]
  rw [if_neg]
  · rfl
  · intro heq
    exact h heq.symm

simp only [sub_eq_zero, ite_eq_right_iff]
  intro h_eq
  exfalso
  apply h
  rw [←h_eq]
  unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
  generalize h_acc : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = acc
  have : acc.eval = 0 := by rw [←h_acc, Exp.eval]
  rw [this]
  clear h_acc this
  revert acc
  induction w with
  | zero =>
    intro acc
    have : args = #v[] := by simp
    simp [this]
  | succ w ih =>
    intro acc
    have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i h
        match i with
        | .zero => rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
    simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
    rw [this]
    have : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
    rw [←this] at ih
    specialize @ih (args.extract 1) (.v args.head + .c 2 * acc)
    simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
      add_tsub_cancel_right] at ih
    rw [ih]
    simp [Exp.eval]

have h_eq : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
    generalize h_acc_e : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = acc_e
    generalize h_acc : (0 : ZMod p) = acc
    have h_inv : acc_e.eval = acc := by rw [←h_acc_e, ←h_acc, Exp.eval]
    clear h_acc_e h_acc
    revert acc acc_e
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      intros acc acc_e h_inv
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this, h_inv]
    | succ w ih =>
      intros acc acc_e h_inv
      have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i h
        match i with
        | .zero => simp; rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at h_args
      rw [h_args]
      simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
        List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
        Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
        Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
      have h_len : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
      rw [←h_len] at ih
      apply ih
      simp [Exp.eval, h_inv]
  rw [h_eq, sub_eq_zero]
  simp [h.symm]

have h_val : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num
    rcases args with ⟨l, hl⟩
    simp [Vector.foldl]
    have : ∀ (acc_e : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)) (acc_v : ZMod p), acc_e.eval = acc_v →
      (List.foldl (fun acc b => Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc) acc_e l).eval =
      List.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) acc_v l := by
      induction l with
      | nil => simp
      | cons x xs ih =>
        intros acc_e acc_v h_eq
        simp
        apply ih
        simp [Exp.eval, h_eq]
    apply this
    simp [Exp.eval]
  rw [if_neg]
  · rfl
  · simp [Exp.eval]
    rw [h_val, sub_eq_zero]
    intro heq
    apply h
    exact heq.symm

unfold bits2num_e bits2num
    rcases args with ⟨l, _⟩
    unfold Vector.foldl
    let f₁ := fun (acc : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)) (b : ZMod p) => Exp.v b + Exp.c 2 * acc
    let f₂ := fun (acc : ZMod p) (b : ZMod p) => b + 2 * acc
    have : ∀ acc, Exp.eval (List.foldl f₁ acc l) = List.foldl f₂ (Exp.eval acc) l := by
      intro acc
      induction l generalizing acc <;> simp [*, List.foldl_cons, Exp.eval, mul_comm]
    specialize this (.c 0)
    simp [Exp.eval] at this
    exact this
  simp [Exp.eval, h_eq, sub_eq_zero, if_neg h.symm]
  rfl

rw [if_neg]
  · rfl
  · intro h_con
    apply h
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_con
    rw [←h_con]
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num
    simp only [Vector.foldl, Vector.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_toArray']
    generalize (Vector.toArray args).data = l
    generalize h_acc : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = acc
    have h_base : Exp.eval acc = 0 := by rw [←h_acc, Exp.eval]
    clear h_acc
    induction l generalizing acc with
    | nil => simp [h_base]
    | cons b bs ih =>
      simp only [List.foldl_cons]
      apply ih
      simp [Exp.eval, h_base]

clear h_ae h_an
      induction l generalizing ae an
      case nil =>
        intros ae an he
        simp [List.foldl, he]
      case cons h t ih =>
        intros ae an he
        simp [List.foldl]
        apply ih
        simp [Exp.eval, he]
    rw [h_val] at h_eq
    contradiction
  · rfl

split_ifs with h_eq
  · exfalso
    rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
    apply h
    rw [←h_eq]
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num
    simp [Vector.foldl, List.foldl_toArray']
    generalize args.toArray.data = l
    generalize (0 : ZMod p) = init
    have : (Exp.c init).eval = init := by simp [Exp.eval]
    induction l generalizing init
    · simp [this]
    · simp; apply l_ih; simp [Exp.eval, this]
  · rfl

· simp only [Exp.eval] at c
      exact sub_eq_zero.mp c
    · rw [if_neg c] at h_red
      contradiction
  simp only [Exp.eval, eq_eval, sub_eq_zero]
  rw [if_neg]
  · intro h_eq
    apply h
    symm
    exact h_eq

    have : 0 = v.eval := by rw [←h_v, Exp.eval]
    rw [this]
    clear h_v this
    revert v args
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      intro args v
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this]
    | succ w ih =>
      intro args v
      have h_decomp : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i h
        match i with
        | .zero => simp; rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at h_decomp
      rw [h_decomp]
      have : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
      rw [←this] at ih
      specialize @ih (args.extract 1) (Exp.v args.head + Exp.c 2 * v)
      simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
        add_tsub_cancel_right] at ih
      simp [ih, Exp.eval, mul_comm]
  rw [h_val]

  · rw [sub_ne_zero]
    exact h.symm

rw [←this]
    clear hv this
    revert v
    induction w with

    | succ w ih =>

      simp [Exp.eval] at ih
      exact ih
  simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero, heq, h.symm]

induction l generalizing acc acc_e with
    | nil => simp [this]
    | cons x xs ih =>

  rw [this, sub_eq_zero]

split_ifs with h_if
  · exfalso
    simp only [sub_eq_zero] at h_if
    apply h
    rw [← h_if]
    clear h h_if cs e
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl

    clear h_eq this
    revert v
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      intro v
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this]
    | succ w ih =>
      intro v
      have : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i h
        match i with
        | .zero => simp; rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at this
      rw [this]

      rw [←this] at ih

      simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
        add_tsub_cancel_right] at ih
      simp [ih, Exp.eval]

· exact h.symm

have : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
    have h := reduce₂ (cs := .nil) (e := .c (bits2num args)) rfl
    simp only [Cs.eval] at h
    split_ifs at h with h_cond
    · simp only [Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero] at h_cond
      exact h_cond
    · contradiction
  rw [this, sub_eq_zero, if_neg h.symm]

intro heq
    apply h
    rw [← heq]
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
    generalize (Exp.c (0 : ZMod p)) = acc_e
    generalize (0 : ZMod p) = acc_v
    have h_acc : acc_e.eval = acc_v := by subst acc_e acc_v; rfl
    induction args.toList generalizing acc_e acc_v with
    | nil => simp; exact h_acc
    | cons b bs ih =>
      simp
      apply ih
      simp [Exp.eval, h_acc]

rw [ite_eq_right_iff]
  intro h_eq
  simp only [sub_eq_zero] at h_eq
  have H := @reduce₂ p _ w args (Exp.c (bits2num args)) Cs.nil rfl
  unfold Cs.eval at H
  simp only [Exp.eval] at H
  split_ifs at H with h_if
  · simp only [sub_eq_zero] at h_if
    rw [h_if] at h_eq
    contradiction
  · contradiction

rw [this]
  split_ifs with h_if
  · rw [sub_eq_zero] at h_if
    contradiction
  · rfl
sub_eq_zero, h.symm]
· exact fun eq => h (eq.symm)

rw [if_neg]
  · rfl
  · simp [sub_eq_zero]
    have h_eq : (bits2num_e args).eval = bits2num args := by
      unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
      generalize hv : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = v
      suffices ∀ (acc : Exp (ZMod p) (ZMod p)), (Vector.foldl (fun acc b => .v b + .c 2 * acc) acc args).eval = Vector.foldl (fun acc b => b + 2 * acc) acc.eval args by
        rw [this v]
        simp [Exp.eval, ←hv]
      intro acc
      induction w with
      | zero =>
        have : args = #v[] := by simp
        simp [this]
      | succ w ih =>
        have h_split : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
          simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]; ext i h; cases i <;> simp [add_comm]
        rw [h_split]
        simp
        rw [ih]
        simp [Exp.eval]
    rw [h_eq]
    exact h.symm

rw [if_neg]
  · rfl
  · intro h_eq
    apply h
    rw [← h_eq]
    unfold bits2num_e bits2num Vector.foldl
    generalize h_init : Exp.c (0 : ZMod p) = acc_e
    have h_acc : acc_e.eval = 0 := by rw [←h_init, Exp.eval]
    rw [← h_acc]
    clear h h_eq h_acc h_init
    revert acc_e
    induction w with
    | zero =>
      intro acc_e
      have : args = #v[] := by simp
      simp [this]
    | succ w ih =>
      intro acc_e
      have h_args : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
        simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
        ext i h
        match i with
        | .zero => simp; rfl
        | .succ i => simp [add_comm]
      simp only [Nat.add_one_sub_one, Vector.tail_eq_cast_extract, Vector.insertIdx_zero] at h_args
      rw [h_args]
      have : min (w + 1) (w + 1) - 1 = w := by simp
      rw [←this] at ih
      specialize @ih (args.extract 1) (.v args.head + .c 2 * acc_e)
      simp only [Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_extract, Vector.size_toArray, min_self,
        add_tsub_cancel_right] at ih
      simp [ih, Exp.eval]
